gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, as event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; furthermore, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students line up outside the university gym clutching resumes inside branded folders, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; additionally, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and students who line up outside the university gym clutch resumes inside branded folders, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and a welcome announcement outlining the fair schedule over the PA system, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, all amidst dozens of booths with colorful banners circling the polished floor, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, with students clutching resumes inside branded folders, as a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
